headline: Assessing Viatris (VTRS) Valuation After FDA Review Acceptance For Fast Acting Non Opioid Meloxicam
summary: Viatris (VTRS) is back in focus after the FDA accepted its New Drug Application for MR-107A-02, a fast acting, non opioid meloxicam formulation for moderate to severe acute pain. See our latest analysis for Viatris. Viatris has already been seeing stronger interest, with a 30 day share price return of 14.12% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 108.76%. This suggests momentum is building as investors weigh its pipeline progress against past earnings pressure. If this kind of pipeline...
